The '''Bergruutfa Clan''' was one of the many [[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clans]] that prospective young [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiates]] were placed in when they first began to learn the ways of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Members of the clan were selected based on their predisposition to be loyal to others and being true to their heart when in darkness. Once a member of the clan, the students would travel together through the [[Jedi academy|academy]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] until the time they [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduated]].

==History==
Named after the enormous [[Bergruutfa/Legends|bergruutfas]] of [[Teloc Ol-sen]], this clan was stationed at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] following the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Bergruutfa clan's teaching was overseen by the [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Quarmall]] and its members were largely [[Human/Legends|Human]], with the inclusion of a [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]], [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]], [[Kel Dor/Legends|Kel Dor]], [[Duros/Legends|Duros]], [[Togruta/Legends|Togruta]] and a [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], the group was in transit aboard a [[Mon Calamari capital ship (Clone Wars)|Mon Calamari starship]] when they were attacked by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] and a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. The ship took heavy fire and the ship was boarded by Grievous and his legions. While Master Quarmall did his best to defend the Initiates, he was left for dead while the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] took off with the younglings.<ref name="SWGG" />

[[File:AllaraEscape.png|thumb|left|250px|The Initiates fight their way out.]]

Landing on CIS-conquered [[Belsus/Legends|Belsus]] aboard a [[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|C-9979 landing craft]], the clan was shepherded off to a holding cell to await for Grievous' orders. In fact the cyborg planned to deliver the group to his master, [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], for conversion into [[Dark side adept/Legends|dark side warriors]]. The group was freed from the cell by an [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] miner and made their way to the Ugnaught shelters near the planet's geothermal power plants. Grievous quickly discovered their locations and ordered their capture and execution; however he was foiled once more by a trio of Jedi set on assassinating him. As Master [[B'dard Tone]] and Knight [[Flynn Kybo]] dueled the [[Kaleesh/Legends|Kaleesh]] cyborg, [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Codi Ty]] rounded up the Padawans and made for their escape [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]]. Ty returned to the Temple, both Tone and Kybo dead, and handed the clan over to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. One of the clan's brightest students, [[Allara]] begged the Council to forgive Ty's disobedience but was ignored as the Council exiled Ty from the Order.<ref name="SWGG" />
